title: node/dispatch: dispatch_udp() returns Option<Result> conflating concerns
description: In node.rs:165, dispatch_udp() returns Option<Result<Dispatched, DispatchError>> which conflates 'is this UDP?' vs 'is this a recognized port?'. Consider returning Result<Dispatched, DispatchResult> where DispatchResult has a NotUdp variant, or document the convention clearly.
